ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the product in ounces */,
  "cost_per_ounce" REAL /* Cost per ounce of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type (e.g., Detangling Leave-in Conditioner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory level was last updated */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_restocked" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last restocked */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the inventory level is critical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the order item */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order item (unit price * quantity + tax - discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, product manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the brand is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)
